mapper.select: SELECT hr.id, hr.employee_id, hr.heart_rate, hr.measure_time, hr.is_abnormal, hr.source, e.name AS employee_name, e.position AS job FROM employee_heart_rate hr LEFT JOIN employee e ON hr.employee_id = e.id WHERE hr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_heart_rate (employee_id, heart_rate, measure_time, is_abnormal, source) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{heartRate}, #{collectTime}, #{isAbnormal}, #{deviceId})
mapper.select:
SELECT e.id AS employee_id, e.name, e.age, e.position AS job, hr_latest.heart_rate AS latest_heart_rate, hr_latest.measure_time AS latest_collect_time, hr_latest.is_abnormal AS latest_is_abnormal, hr_latest.source AS latest_device_id, IFNULL(hr_stat.total_records, 0) AS total_records, IFNULL(hr_stat.abnormal_count, 0) AS abnormal_count, IFNULL(dis_stat.disease_count, 0) AS disease_count, streak_info.streak_start AS streak_start_time FROM employee e LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hr1.* FROM employee_heart_rate hr1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT employee_id, MAX(measure_time) AS max_time FROM employee_heart_rate GROUP BY employee_id ) hr2 ON hr1.employee_id = hr2.employee_id AND hr1.measure_time = hr2.max_time ) hr_latest ON e.id = hr_latest.employee_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) AS total_records, SUM(is_abnormal) AS abnormal_count FROM employee_heart_rate GROUP BY employee_id ) hr_stat ON e.id = hr_stat.employee_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) AS disease_count FROM employee_disease_relation GROUP BY employee_id ) dis_stat ON e.id = dis_stat.employee_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT h1.employee_id, MIN(h1.measure_time) AS streak_start FROM employee_heart_rate h1 WHERE h1.is_abnormal = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM employee_heart_rate h2 WHERE h2.employee_id = h1.employee_id AND h2.is_abnormal = 0 AND h2.measure_time > h1.measure_time ) GROUP BY h1.employee_id ) streak_info ON e.id = streak_info.employee_id
AND e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND e.position LIKE CONCAT('%', #{job}, '%')
AND hr_latest.is_abnormal = #{isAbnormal}
ORDER BY e.id
